title: geum rossii var. depressum
intro: Geum rossii var. depressum, also known as Alpine Avens, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. Alpine Avens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used to treat colds, sore throats, and digestive issues.
